name: oh-my-codex-slim
description: OMO-slim orchestration port for Codex: orchestrator hook, ported OMO skills, and five specialist agent roles.
author: YanzuoLu

interface.shortDescription: OMO-slim orchestration guidance and specialist agent setup for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Oh My Codex Slim ports the OMO-slim orchestration contract to Codex: the orchestrator directive is injected at SessionStart, omo skills are ported (simplify, deepwork, reflect, codemap, clonedeps, worktrees), and setup registers five OMO-style specialist lanes (explorer, librarian, oracle, designer, fixer) as Codex agents (Codex's built-in default/worker agents remain). As in omo-slim, code review is the oracle lane; there is no separate reviewer agent. Delegation uses Codex stable multi_agent tools (spawn_agent/wait_agent/resume_agent/close_agent) when the model chooses to delegate.
